allow: PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='chrome.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'cdp-|c2-|cdp-live|--headless' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; "cleaned headless chrome")

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='chrome.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'cdp-|c2-|cdp-w|cdp-m2|cdp-live|--remote-debugging-port' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; "cleaned")

PowerShell($out = "C:\\tmp\\maintenance2.png"; if \(Test-Path $out\) { Remove-Item $out -Force }; & "C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe" --headless=new --disable-gpu --hide-scrollbars --window-size=1280,1600 --screenshot="$out" "http://localhost:3000/" 2>$null | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; if \(Test-Path $out\) { "OK: $\(\(Get-Item $out\).Length\) bytes" } else { "FAILED" })
PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { "PID on 3000: $\($conn.OwningProcess\)" } else { "port 3000 free" })
